title: keeper-ksm.v1
description: L1-supported schema marker for the keeper-ksm family (P13 in docs/V2_DECISIONS.md). Declarative KSM body fields remain closed until ksm_apps, ksm_clients, and ksm_shares are modeled.

x-keeper-live-proof.notes: Sprint 7h-43 W2 L1: KsmLoginHelper authenticated Commander, bootstrapped/redeemed KSM config, and proved KSM fetch-write-fetch restore on the editable bus record.
